==Freeing Skrach Uglogwee==
===Details===
</includeonly>
{{Quest details
|start = Inspect [[Skrach Uglogwee]].
|startmap = 3208,3225
|difficulty = Special
|description = To protect Skrach Uglogwee from the Culinaromancer, you need to feed him a cooked jubbly bird, the most delicious type of Chompy in the Feldip Hills. You need to talk to [[Rantz]] to learn how to get one.
|length = Medium
|requirements = *{{SCP|Cooking|41|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}} {{Questreqstart|no}}
*{{SCP|Firemaking|20|link=yes}} {{Boostable|Yes}} {{Questreqstart|no}}

**[[Big Chompy Bird Hunting]]
**[[Recipe for Disaster/Another Cook's Quest]]
***[[Cook's Assistant]]
|items = *[[Axe]] (a [[blessed axe]] will not work)
*[[Raw chompy]] (bring several if you have a low cooking level)
*[[Iron spit]] (made on an anvil with an [[iron bar]])
*[[Logs]] (obtainable during the quest)
*[[Tinderbox]]
*[[Pickaxe]]
*[[Ogre bellows]] (obtainable during the quest)
*[[Ball of wool]]
*[[Ogre bow]] or [[comp ogre bow]] (can be purchased from Rantz during the quest for at most 600 [[coins]])
*[[Ogre arrows]] Chisel, knife, wolf bones, and feathers if you are making your own ogre arrows ([[Brutal arrows]] also work if using a comp ogre bow)
|recommended = *[[Antipoison]], [[armour]], and some [[food]] (if low leveled)
*[[Chisel]], [[knife]], [[wolf bones]], and [[feather]]s if you are making your own [[ogre arrow]]s
*Fast travel to several locations
**Lumbridge ([[Lumbridge teleport]])
**Feldip Hills ([[Feldip Hills teleport]], [[Fairy Rings]] to {{fairycode|aks}} or the [[Eagle Transport System]])
**Tai Bwo Wannai ([[Tai Bwo Wannai teleport]], [[Fairy Rings]] to {{fairycode|ckr}} or travel via [[Brimhaven]])
|kills = * [[Jubbly bird]] ''(Level 11)''
|ironman = *{{SCP|Smithing|17|link=yes}} {{Boostable|Yes}} for an [[iron spit]] without access to [[Weiss]]
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Not completable, as it requires access to Misthalin.
</poem>
}}

===Walkthrough===
----
[[File:Rantz chathead.png|left]]
'''Inspect Skrach Uglogwee in the Lumbridge Castle dining room to start the quest'''. Head to the Feldip Hills (fairy ring code {{Fairycode|aks}}) and talk to [[Rantz]]. He will tell you that he wants to travel to [[Karamja]] to make some type of [[Relicym's balm|potion]], but before that, he wants you to meet him south-east of his cave.

Walk directly south-east towards the transportation symbol on your map. Talk to him again, go through the dialogue; he will kick over a tree and ask you to make it into a boat. Use your [[axe]] on it '''twice''' to make a boat. 

Talk to Rantz again and he will shoot an arrow to a tree on Karamja. Talk to him once more and he will tell you to cook a [[chompy]] there for good luck. If you don't have any [[raw chompy|raw chompies]], kill a [[chompy bird]] or two and gather the raw chompies before you leave. If you didn't bring Logs, chop down a normal tree in the area to get one log.[[File:Recipe for Disaster - Freeing Skrach Uglogwee - fire location.png|thumb|220px|The location you need to make the fire.]]
Travel to Karamja:
*If you have used the [[fairy ring]] tele (Karamja is {{fairycode|ckr}}) then make your way west towards the coastline and then north up the coast until you find a tree with an arrow in it. There are also dead trees to the west coastline if you still need a log.
*If you have travelled to Brimhaven, travel south past the general store and hug the west coastline.
The tree with the arrow in it is north-west of [[Tai Bwo Wannai]] village, just north of [[Banisoch]], who is marked with a dungeon icon - the tree is denoted by the [[Transportation]] icon.

Make a fire next to the tree, and then, use your [[iron spit]] on a [[chompy]] and cook the skewered chompy by using it on the fire. If you succeed, Rantz's kids will take the boat to you and take you back.

Rantz will tell you to make a balloon toad to use as bait, to catch the [[Jubbly bird]]. (The Rantz near the water, there are two versions of him)

'''<u>Note: Purchasing jubbly from the Grand Exchange will not work. You will be met with the message "You need to cook your own jubbly meat to set Skrach free."</u>'''

*Fill your bellows up on the swamp—then, use them on a toad. You should get around three toads just to be sure, because the next part can fail.
*Mine the same amount of [[Rock (elemental)|rock]]s as you have toads to the west of the swamp, just north of the Fairy Ring, to get a "rock". There is also a mining spot next to Rantz's cave.
*With the rock and [[ball of wool]] in your inventory, inflate the bellows with swamp gas again; then, use them on your already inflated toad to create a [[balloon toad]]. The ball of wool is not consumed upon its creation, but there is a small chance that it will get used up as you create more balloon toads.
*'''''Drop''''' the balloon toad south of Rantz's cave or east of the [[gnome glider]].
[[File:Recipe for Disaster - Freeing Skrach Uglogwee - hunting jubbly.png|thumb|220px|The jubbly bird appears!]]
*Now, wait for the [[Jubbly bird]] (level 9). If it doesn't appear, you'll have get another balloon toad (If you're having trouble getting a Jubbly bird to spawn, log out and log back in. Note: Logging out will make you unable to attack the bird if it spawns). When it appears, kill it with your [[ogre bow]]. Then pluck it, take the meat, and '''''cook it on Rantz' ogre spit'''''. (Near Rantz's cave) Go back to [[Lumbridge Castle]] and then '''''carefully right-click and use the cooked jubbly on Skrach Uglogwee.''''' If you eat it, you'll have to get another one.
**Killing and cooking multiple jubblies may be beneficial in the event that you burn/accidentally eat some.
